task1.title: The Australian school leaversdid immediately after leaving secondary school
task1.instruction: The charts show the Australian school leavers did immediately after leaving secondary school. Summarize the information by selecting and reporting the main features and make comparisons where relevant.

task2.title: Environmental Protection
task2.instruction: In some countries, it is possible for people to have a variety of food that has been transported from all over the world. Do the advantages outweigh the disadvantages?
